DEPARTMENT OF COMPUTER SCIENCE
Highlights
• 35 Years of Academic Excellence
• 52 University Ranks, including 5 Gold Medals
• 60% of Faculty Members hold Doctoral Degrees
• Secured ₹32.26 Lakhs in Research Funding from UGC, ICSSR, AICTE, and
ICSSR-IMPRESS
• Established a state-of-the-art AI & ML Laboratory with financial support from
DST-FIST
• 370+ Research Publications and 100+ Books with ISBN
• 100% Internship Opportunities ensuring hands-on industry exposure
• Industry-Oriented Curriculum aligned with current market needs
• Skill Development Certificate Courses with Industry Certifications
• Excellent Placement Record with opportunities in leading organizations
• National-Level Achievements in the Smart India Hackathon
• Promotes an Innovative and Experiential Learning Environment
• MoUs with reputed organizations including IBM, L&T EduTech, HCL GUVI, Rently
Software Development Pvt. Ltd., Automation Anywhere, and Easy Design
Systems
• NEW MoU with Face Prep: Supports placement training, skill development, and career enhancement programs specially for the BCA course.
• Strong Industry Collaborations for internships and skill enhancement programs
• Dr. EBG Awards for Academic Excellence in Degree Programmes
• Ranked among the Top 50 (BCA Stream) in the MDRA India Today Survey
• Ranked among the Top 100 (Computer Science Stream) in the MDRA India
Today Survey
• Regular interaction with industry experts through seminars, guest lectures,
mentoring sessions, and motivational talks
• Active Alumni Network supporting mentoring, mock interviews, placements,
and internships
• Earn-While-You-Learn opportunities for students
• Secured 4 Overall Trophies in intercollegiate co-curricular competitions

Student Achievements in Innovation
• Conferred the ‘NAARI SHAKTI’ Award by ISRO and GTU University at Smart India
Hackathon 2022
• Won First Prize with a Cash Award of ₹75,000 at the National-Level Smart India
Hackathon 2019 held at Varanasi.
DEPARTMENT OF MICROBIOLOGY
HIGHLIGHTS:
• 31 years of Academic Excellence.
• Runners of Israel-India Global Innovators Hackathon.
• Ms Madhavi. K. Nishol of BSc Microbiology had participated in the
Republic Day Parade at New Delhi.
• Winners of Smart India Hackathon.
• Winners of Enviro Solvers Hackathon under the theme “Single-use
plastic " organized by Tamil Nadu Pollution Control Board.
• Best Department in Academic Category.
• 79 University ranks secured so far, including 9 gold medals for first
rank.
• The Week Hansa Research Survey 2024: Ranked among the Top
100 Science Colleges (60th Rank).
• Open Magazine – Zone Wise Ranking – 31st Rank.
• Well-equipped UG, PG laboratories & Centralized Instrumentation
Room.
• Skill-Oriented Training.

• Industry Institute Interactions.
• Embedded Online Courses.
• Internships
• Industrial visits
• Extension activities
• Placements
• Hands on Training & Workshops.
• Guest Lectures & Conferences.
• Vibrant Eco club- Environment Awareness Activities.
• Journal Review Club
Academic Excellence & Rankings – 33 years of excellence with 41 university ranks,
8 gold medals, top rankings by The Times of India (2025), India Today (2025), and
Open Magazine (2023), along with Best Department Awards and 100% results in
June 2025.
Strong Industry Connect – MoUs and collaborations with leading organizations like
Infosys BPM, industrial visits, expert talks, knowledge sessions, internships, and
industrial training for real-time exposure.
Skill Development & Certifications – Certificate courses in Applied AI (Advanced
Excel) and Data Analytics (Power BI), workshops, case studies, management
games, and structured placement training with assistance.
Entrepreneurial & Global Exposure – Entrepreneurial initiatives (E-talks, My Story,
Anubhav, Ideation), Vaniga Vaibhav trade fair, alumni mentoring, and Study Abroad
Program at Asia Pacific University of Technology & Innovation, Malaysia.

Holistic Development & Social Responsibility – Extension activities promoting
Corporate Social Responsibility and continuous engagement in student-centric
development programs.
Department of Commerce - Highlights
1. Ranked among Top 100 Colleges in India - India Today MDRA Ranking 2025
2. 80 University Ranks and 9 Gold Medals for First Rank
3. ICSSR Funded project for Rs. 15, 00,000
4. Industry Interaction with leading industries for internships and realtime projects

TRUST BROCHURE
Nurturing Dreams! Empowering Vision!
35 years of Academic Excellence
ABOUT US
Sri Ramakrishna College of Arts & Science for Women, an Autonomous
Institution affiliated to Bharathiar University has a legacy of 35 years of
empowering women. Through International MoUs, Industry Collaborations and
Placement support, the college ensures that the students are future-ready
professionals. The National level ranking, recognition through DST grants and
accomplished alumnae stands as a testimonial to the Institution’s Excellence.
SRCW is an integral part of a prominent- SNR Sons Charitable Trust in
Coimbatore, dedicated to offering quality education and advanced healthcare.
The trust is successfully running 15 organisations spanning various fields
including Medical, Paramedical, Engineering, Arts and Science, Technology and
Schools.
ACCOLADES
● Re - accredited with ‘A+’ grade by NAAC
● Ranked in NIRF 2025 (201-300 Band)
● 430 University ranks including 59 gold medals
• DST FIST sponsored Research Labs

An Autonomous Institution
Affiliated to Bharathiar University
Re-accredited by NAAC with A+ Grade

Colleges (Education World India Higher Education Rankings 2025)
● Skill Development Leadership Award by World HRD Congress
